title: Model Changer
description: A fabric mod change player models to 3D Models with .glb format
body:
ModelChanger is a client side Fabric mod that lets you use custom 3D `.glb` models in Minecraft.

Place your models in the `minecraft/ModelChanger` folder, open the config screen, and select the model you want to use. The mod includes a live preview, player replacement support, and full transform controls so you can fine-tune your model directly in game.

Features
- Load custom `.glb` models from a local folder
- Automatic model folder creation
- Bundled models included in the mod are copied to your `ModelChanger` folder on first launch
- Live model preview in the config screen
- Replace the local player model
- Optional player replacement for other players
- Automatic scaling to player size
- Animation support
- Easy folder access from the config screen

Configuration
- Replace Players
- Replace Player Limit
- Replace Player Range
- Auto Scale To Player
- Allow Animations

Transform Settings
- Scale
- Offset X
- Offset Y
- Offset Z
- Rotation X
- Rotation Y
- Rotation Z

Model Folder
- Location: `.minecraft/ModelChanger`
- Supported file type: `.glb`
